experience.description_raw:
In my role, I played a key part in enabling SAP’s next-generation container services platform within ECS, contributing to the shift from traditional VM-based deployments to cloud-native, Kubernetes-driven architectures. I worked extensively with SAP Gardener to provision and manage Kubernetes clusters across AWS, Azure, and GCP, gaining deep exposure to large-scale, multi-cloud infrastructure. I helped onboard services like Enterprise Threat Detection, Cloud Connector, and Web Dispatcher onto Kubernetes, using ArgoCD, Argo Workflows, and Helm to implement GitOps-based automated deployments.

I strengthened observability by integrating Prometheus, Grafana, and centralized logging pipelines, and supported container image management through AWS ECR with replication and vulnerability scanning. My work also included contributing to backup and restore setups using Velero, aligning with enterprise-grade security, resilience, and compliance requirements.

This role accelerated my growth as a cloud-native engineer, giving me hands-on expertise in Kubernetes, automation, distributed systems, and modern DevOps practices. It enabled me to combine technical depth with architectural thinking, improving my ability to design scalable services, troubleshoot complex cloud environments, and contribute meaningfully to next-generation platform engineering initiatives.
responsibilities: Enabled transition from traditional VM-based deployments to Kubernetes-based cloud-native architecture
Provisioned and managed Kubernetes clusters using SAP Gardener across AWS, Azure, and GCP
Implemented GitOps-based deployments using ArgoCD and Argo Workflows
Onboarded enterprise services (Enterprise Threat Detection, Cloud Connector, Web Dispatcher) onto Kubernetes
Built observability stack using Prometheus, Grafana, and centralized logging
Managed container image lifecycle using AWS ECR (replication + vulnerability scanning)
Implemented backup and restore solutions using Velero
Worked on enterprise-grade security, compliance, and resilience systems
impact: Enabled large-scale cloud-native transformation across SAP ECS platform
Improved deployment automation and reliability using GitOps practices
Enhanced observability and monitoring across distributed systems
Strengthened system resilience through backup, restore, and HA strategies
Built strong expertise in multi-cloud Kubernetes infrastructure

experience.description_raw:
As a Software Engineer 3, I’ve taken on key responsibilities that drive innovation and efficiency across our projects:

Cloud Migration: Spearheaded the transition of multiple applications to the cloud using Kubernetes, Helm, and Docker, ensuring enhanced scalability and reliability.

Database Optimization: Led the migration of MySQL Standalone Databases to a High Availability architecture using Galera, significantly improving system resilience and uptime.

VM Migration: Orchestrated the migration from vCenter VMs to Proxmox VMs, streamlining infrastructure and boosting virtualization performance.

CI/CD Enhancement: Refined our Jenkins setup, optimizing the CI/CD pipeline for smoother, more efficient development and deployment cycles.

Team Development: Actively contributed to the hiring and onboarding of interns and team members, mentoring them into valuable, self-sufficient contributors within the project.

This role has allowed me to blend technical expertise with leadership, fostering innovation and growth in both infrastructure and talent.
responsibilities: Led cloud migration of applications using Kubernetes, Docker, and Helm
Migrated MySQL standalone databases to High Availability using Galera cluster
Orchestrated migration from vCenter VMs to Proxmox virtualization platform
Optimized Jenkins CI/CD pipelines for improved efficiency
Mentored interns and contributed to hiring initiatives
impact: Improved scalability and reliability of applications through cloud migration
Enhanced database resilience and uptime using HA architecture
Reduced infrastructure overhead and improved performance via Proxmox migration
Accelerated deployment cycles through CI/CD improvements

experience.description_raw:
As a Software Engineer 2, I played a pivotal role in enhancing system reliability and optimizing team performance:

High Availability Migration: Successfully transitioned web applications from load balancers to a High Availability setup using HA Proxy and Ucarp, ensuring seamless service and scalability improvements.

Automated OS Patching: Developed a robust automated solution for quarterly OS patching of virtual machines, meticulously crafted to uphold application availability and achieve zero downtime.

Intelligent Chatbot Development: Designed and implemented a smart chatbot that monitors and analyzes user-submitted pipeline jobs. It delivers real-time insights to the users on their query and issue detection, intelligently resolving problems through automation or retry mechanisms, while keeping users informed of job statuses and outcomes.

Team Building and Mentorship: Actively engaged in the recruitment and onboarding of interns and team members, providing mentorship to nurture their skills and transform them into independent contributors to our projects.

This role allowed me to blend technical expertise with mentorship, driving both project success and team development effectively.
responsibilities: Migrated applications to High Availability architecture using HAProxy and UCARP
Developed automated OS patching system ensuring zero downtime
Designed and implemented intelligent chatbot for pipeline monitoring
Automated issue detection and resolution mechanisms
Mentored interns and contributed to team hiring
impact: Reduced manual effort through automation and chatbot system

experience.description_raw:
As a Software Engineer 1, I focused on driving performance improvements and collaboration:

Web Application Optimisation: Enhanced loading times by optimising MySQL queries, resulting in a faster and more responsive user experience.

UI Enhancements: Improved multiple UI sections to deliver a better overall user experience, ensuring intuitive navigation and functionality.

REST API Development: Developed robust REST APIs tailored to the specific needs of other teams, facilitating seamless data access and integration.

Monitoring Solutions: Created Java JARs to run as cron jobs for monitoring application performance and CI/CD pipeline health, proactively identifying issues and ensuring system reliability.

Talent Acquisition Support: Actively participated in the hiring process for interns and team members, contributing to building a skilled and dynamic team.

In this role, I cultivated my technical abilities while fostering a collaborative environment that promotes innovation and efficiency.
responsibilities: Optimized MySQL queries improving application performance
Enhanced UI/UX across multiple web application modules
Developed REST APIs for cross-team data integration
Built monitoring tools using Java cron jobs
Participated in hiring processes
impact: Contributed to team growth through hiring support

experience.description_raw:
As a Software Engineer Intern, I contributed to project efficiency and user experience through the following key tasks:

Dashboard Development: Created multiple dashboards to visualise pipeline job information, providing users with valuable insights at a glance.

UI Enhancements: Enhanced the dashboards to incorporate CRUD operations, enabling users to interact with the data seamlessly through a user-friendly interface.

Workflow Analysis: Gained a comprehensive understanding of project workflows and architecture, offering innovative ideas to optimise processes and improve overall efficiency.

This internship allowed me to apply my skills in a practical setting while gaining valuable insights into software development and project management.
responsibilities: Developed dashboards for pipeline job monitoring
Implemented CRUD operations in UI
Analyzed workflows and suggested improvements

experience.description_raw: During my internship, I gained valuable insights into User Interface (UI) and User Experience (UX) design for web applications, focusing on enhancing usability and creating intuitive, user-friendly experiences.
responsibilities: Worked on UI/UX design improvements
Enhanced usability of web applications

experience.description_raw: During my internship, I delved into the fascinating world of network protocols and the intricate design of routers that connect to modems, enhancing the functionality of internet access devices. This experience ignited my passion for building robust and efficient network infrastructures.
responsibilities: Studied network protocols
Analyzed router and modem connectivity design
Learned fundamentals of networking infrastructure

career_progression: Intern → Software Engineer 1 → Software Engineer 2 → Software Engineer 3 → Cloud Service Specialist
